title: taraxacum dasypodum
intro: Taraxacum dasypodum, also known as rough hawk's beard or rough dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum dasypodum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
